description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with a prominent gable roof and a clean, geometric facade. The exterior is primarily composed of light-colored materials, with a striped pattern on the ground and a sleek, flat wall surface. The front entryway is recessed and partially sheltered, flanked by a small porch area and a single tree, adding a touch of greenery. The side views reveal a series of vertical panels and a consistent use of rectangular forms, while the rear and side yards are landscaped with additional trees. The windows are arranged in a subtle, asymmetrical pattern, blending into the facade. The overall structure is compact, with a single story and a focus on simplicity and functionality.
description: A modern, single-story house with a gable roof, minimalist facade, and landscaped yard featuring trees and striped ground patterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, gable roof, and a tree near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat wall, vertical paneling, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_2: Rear gable view emphasizing the roof structure and a tree in the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical panels and a tree near the side yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a small porch, single door, steps, and minimal decorative elements.
